mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SHARE_LINK ( batch_id, share_token, created_by, share_scope, allow_comments, allow_download, expires_at, revoked_yn, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{batchId}, #{shareToken}, #{createdBy}, #{shareScope}, #{allowComments}, #{allowDownload}, #{expiresAt}, #{revokedYn}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT share_id, batch_id, share_token, created_by, share_scope, allow_comments, allow_download, expires_at, revoked_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM SHARE_LINK WHERE share_token = #{token} LIMIT 1

SELECT share_id, batch_id, share_token, created_by, share_scope, allow_comments, allow_download, expires_at, revoked_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM SHARE_LINK WHERE share_token = #{token} AND revoked_yn = 'N' AND expires_at > NOW() LIMIT 1

SELECT share_id, batch_id, share_token, created_by, share_scope, allow_comments, allow_download, expires_at, revoked_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM SHARE_LINK WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND created_by = #{createdBy} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT share_id, batch_id, share_token, created_by, share_scope, allow_comments, allow_download, expires_at, revoked_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM SHARE_LINK WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND revoked_yn = 'N' AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC
